name: @phazur/scry
description: The discernment gate for agent skills. Scry reads every third-party SKILL.md skill for supply-chain and injection risk, renders a verdict, and blocks your agent from running one with an unallowed critical — turning blind trust into an explicit, enforced, accountable decision. Host-agnostic scanner; enforcing gate ships first for Claude Code.
author: Phazur Labs
//dependencies: commander: argument parsing for the CLI surface. picocolors: zero-dep ANSI colors for the terminal report. zod: validates the on-disk lock.json and config so a corrupt file fails loudly rather than silently misbehaving. No other runtime deps; the scanner itself is pure Node + std lib so it runs fully offline.
